Most businesses run on disconnected tools — one for HR, one for the gate, one for the ERP. Velantra brings them together. One platform, one view, one place to act.

Four products. One operational advantage.

Give employees, security teams, and HR leaders the tools they need while keeping every workflow connected.

Employee Work Buddy

Smart-ID

Your employees spend less time on HR admin and more time on work that matters. Smart ID puts everything they need in one place — on their phone, in the moment.

View Product →
Visitor & Gate Control

Smart-Gate

Every person, vehicle, and material that moves through your facility — known, approved, and accounted for. SmartGate replaces uncertainty at the gate with complete operational control.

View Product →
People & HR Operations

Smart-People

From the day someone joins to the day they leave, Smart HR handles the full employee lifecycle without spreadsheets, without follow-up emails, and without things falling through the cracks.

View Product →
AI Integration & Reporting

AI + ERP Connect

Your ERP holds the data. AI + ERP Connect turns it into answers — without a single manual report, and without replacing the ERP you already run.

View Product →
What We Do

We Built What Operations Teams Actually Need

After 20+ years working inside factories, facilities, and enterprise operations, we stopped waiting for a product that understood the real problem. So we built one.
